description: The AvatarSlotEquippedToggle component drives one or two booleans to a state depending on if an AvatarObjectSlot is equipped or not.

fields.ObjectSlot: The Avatar Object Slot to monitor for equipping status.
fields.EquippedDrive: Drives the target bool to true when ``ObjectSlot`` is equipped. Otherwise false.
fields.DequippedDrive: Drives the target bool to false when ``ObjectSlot`` is equipped. Otherwise true.
